description.value: Ground shakes violently in area. All creatures make [[/save type=reflex]]. Compare your weaving successes to their save successes. If you have more, creatures fall Prone. Structures may collapse (GM discretion). Area becomes difficult terrain.

system.targetingSuccessScaling:
- 0 = Fails
- 1 = Prone (1 round, 25ft radius)
- 2 = Prone (1 minute, 50ft radius)
- 3 = Prone (1 minute, 100ft radius)
system.weavingRoll: Earth Potential + Earth Mastery / Space Potential + Space Mastery
